g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the RAG chatbot flow from the start')
sendPrompt('How does the user send a message in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does query rewriting work in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does query embedding work in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does vector similarity search work in Supabase for the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How are retrieved chunks ranked by similarity in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM tool round work in the RAG chatbot? salonToolRound.ts')
sendPrompt('What are the three tools in the RAG chatbot: check_stylist_availability, get_service_price, suggest_appointment_slots?')
sendPrompt('How does buildGroundedInstructions construct the XML prompt in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does generateGroundedAnswer work in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How are citations built from retrieved chunks in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What does chatTelemetry log in the RAG chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /api/chat response contain?')
sendPrompt('How does ChatView.tsx render the answer, citations, and tool results?')
